name: Apple Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 Granny Smith or other tart apple
recipeInstructions:
Combine the whole-wheat flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk, molasses, oil, lemon juice, and egg until well combined.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just mixed through. Do not overmix. Stir in the chopped apple.
Lightly coat a griddle with cooking spray. Using a 1/4-cup measure, pour batter onto the hot griddle.
Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges are set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip the pancakes and cook until golden brown on the other side, about 2 minutes more.
Repeat with remaining batter, adding more cooking spray as needed to prevent sticking.
The recipe yields 12 substantial pancakes, enough for four people.
